no: Spell-50 by Weimer (PPG). Extends priest/druid/mage spell scaling to higher levels. Affects damage, duration, number of targets — everything that scales with caster level. Applies equally to PCs and enemies. Install AFTER all spell-adding mods (IWDification, MiH SP, TotLM) so it patches their spells too. CONFLICTS: Incompatible with Spell Revisions main component (SR rebalances spells differently). Clashes with MiH Fixes cn:18 (Revised Spell Damage Caps). SCS spell tweaks may override some scaling. Not .

conflicts.reason: Both modify saving throw penalties for spells. Don't mix — use one or the other

sum: Adjusts spell power for level 50+ characters, addressing balance issues at extremely high levels where vanilla spells become trivial.

co.no: Extends all spell scaling to level 50. Fireball at L50 = 50d6 damage, Blur lasts 150 rounds. Maximum scaling — most powerful. Choose one cap level.
Extends spell scaling to level 40. High but slightly less extreme than 50. Choose one cap level.
Extends spell scaling to level 30. IWD's default cap. Moderate power increase. Choose one cap level.
Level 20 cap — BG/BG2 vanilla default. No change from base game. Only useful if another mod changed the cap and you want to reset. Choose one cap level.
Level 1 cap — spells never scale. All spells cast at minimum power. Extreme challenge mode. Choose one cap level.
Use a custom cap defined in spell50.ini. For fine-tuning. Choose one cap level.
